overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person nighttime driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player navigates wet streets passing industrial buildings, digital billboards, and other vehicles while heavy rain creates reflective surfaces and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with neon lighting and intersections

events.description: makes right turn at first intersection
approaches crosswalk with pedestrian visible on right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets at moderate speed, making turns at intersections while rain falls

notable_agents.action: standing on sidewalk near crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with green digital speedometer and navigation displays
rain-soaked reflective street surface with puddles and road markings
tall industrial street lights casting yellow-orange glow on wet pavement
colorful illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building facades
industrial concrete structures with metal accents lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates intersections with wet reflective roads illuminated by street lamps and neon signage. A pedestrian stands on the sidewalk near a crosswalk as the car makes a right turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with large vehicle presence and fencing

events.description: large Arasaka corporation truck appears on left side of road ahead
overtakes the Arasaka truck on the right side

agents.ego_description: accelerating along industrial road and overtaking a large commercial truck in the rain

notable_agents.action: large Arasaka corporation truck driving in same direction, then being overtaken on the right

entered.detail: large white commercial truck with Arasaka corporation branding and logo
metal chain-link fencing running along the right side of the industrial road
warehouse-like concrete structures with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: Driving through a more industrial zone with warehouses and chain-link fencing, the vehicle encounters and overtakes a large Arasaka corporation truck. The road remains wet from heavy rain, illuminated by street lamps now positioned on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with digital billboards and industrial fencing approaching underpass

events.description: enters area with dense digital billboard coverage on left side of road

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed past rows of illuminated billboards while approaching an underpass tunnel

entered.detail: series of large illuminated advertising screens displaying various brands and colorful graphics
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art and tags
concrete bridge overpass structure marking the entrance to a covered roadway section

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a corridor lined with bright digital billboards on the left and graffiti-covered walls on the right. The chain-link fence runs closer to the road as the car approaches a concrete underpass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass tunnel transitioning to open street with bridge overhead

events.description: enters covered underpass with reduced lighting and enclosed concrete walls
exits underpass back into open rainy street with neon lighting visible
makes sharp right turn under bridge structure

agents.ego_description: driving through underpass tunnel, exiting to open street, then navigating sharp turns under bridge structures

notable_agents.action: walking on sidewalk near underpass exit

entered.detail: covered roadway with overhead concrete structure and artificial tunnel lighting
vehicles parked along the right side of the street near the underpass exit
elevated roadway bridge structure passing directly overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass with concrete walls and artificial lighting, temporarily sheltered from the rain. Upon exiting, the scene opens to reveal parked cars and a pedestrian on the sidewalk. The car then makes a sharp right turn under an overhead bridge structure to complete the drive.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that shifts from neon-lit intersections into a gritty industrial corridor. It begins by navigating wet, reflective roads illuminated by street lamps and neon signage, passing a lone pedestrian as the vehicle makes a right turn. As the environment transitions into an industrial zone, the camera overtakes a large Arasaka corporation truck while passing warehouses and chain-link fencing under a steady downpour. The scene then shifts toward a corridor of bright digital billboards and graffiti-covered walls before the vehicle enters a sheltered concrete underpass. Upon exiting the artificial lighting of the tunnel, the camera reveals parked cars and a pedestrian before making a final sharp right turn under an overhead bridge.
